title: Nicomachus: 1^3+...+n^3 = (1+...+n)^2
statement_informal: The sum of the first n cubes equals the square of the sum of the first n numbers.

cost_model.notes: Sum of cubes equals the square of the sum; stated as 4*sumcube = (n(n+1))^2.

references: Knuth, TAOCP Vol. 1 §1.2.3 — sums; Nicomachus's theorem.
